description: Enchanted dishes and magical fare found in fantasy settings.
foods: A tiny cake dusted with sugar that glows faintly, said to taste like whatever the eater misses most.
Baked with berries that only ripen under a full moon, filling the room with silver-white light when cut.
A fiery broth seasoned with peppers that grow near dragon lairs, hot enough to make your ears steam.
A loaf that never goes stale, each slice tasting freshly baked no matter how long it's been sitting.
Harvested from bees that feed on night-blooming flowers, it glows faintly and hums when you open the jar.
Dark purple preserves that tingle on the tongue and leave a warmth in the chest that lasts for hours.
A soft strange fruit that tastes different to everyone who bites it, and nobody can quite describe how.
A pastry leavened with a whispered charm instead of yeast, impossibly light and warm long after baking.
